data.body: CHECKPOINT 3 (2026-07-13) - INCIDENT + 15a1. dc33 v2 (freshen-before-annotate) landed (#648) + deployed; store self-heals on boot. BUT deploy surfaced a LIVE drive-path malfunction: bot looped emitting AUTOLANDER_ERROR on a stale Autosubmit'd 3-change stack (#644/#645/#646 'speed up gerrit-verify', another agent's). CONTAINED by engaging S5d emergency-stop sentinel (/var/gerrit/site/autolander/emergency-stop) -> bot PAUSED, flood stopped, alarm clearing. Filed bug 15a1 (verified-cork-hapuka, discovered_from f1fa). ROOT CAUSE (confirmed): _drive_candidate guard 'if "not fast-forward" not in str(exc).lower(): raise' MISSES Gerrit's FFO submit-reject wording 'requires all submissions to be a fast-forward' (git push wording != gerrit submit wording) -> 409 re-raised instead of routed to rebase -> run_loop emits error -> re-selected every poll (Autosubmit never cleared) -> infinite loop. SECONDARY: remove_autosubmit_from_stack zeroes only RebarBotNava's OWN Autosubmit vote; other-account's +1 keeps label:Autosubmit+1 matching -> re-select on a true rebase conflict; select_front_candidate doesn't consult handback markers. USER DECISIONS: (1) FIX 15a1 BEFORE closing epic; (2) bot STAYS PAUSED until 15a1 fixed; I manually unblock 644/645/646. ACTIONS IN FLIGHT: subagent ad9e6b7 implementing 15a1 fix (broaden FF match via _is_fast_forward_reject + select_front_candidate skips unacked-handback markers + tests); manually rebased 644/645/646 onto main via Gerrit REST (PS3, CI re-running, poll bjeyqrbt8) to unblock that agent. NEXT: land 15a1 fix -> redeploy -> verify stale-stack no-loop -> REMOVE emergency-stop (resume bot) -> land 644/645/646 -> close dc33 (attestation) -> 3c55(S5) -> epic f1fa. Bot MUST stay paused until 15a1 deployed. Closed+signed: 38be,ea61,0525,0ee8. Open follow-up: 0d3e (Autosubmit dropped on bot's own rebase).
